mapper.select: SELECT * FROM training_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM training_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY train_date DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_record (user_id, train_date, duration, total_sets, total_reps, calories, difficulty, is_completed, notes) VALUES (#{userId}, #{trainDate}, #{duration}, #{totalSets}, #{totalReps}, #{calories}, #{difficulty}, #{isCompleted}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE training_record SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE training_record SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE user_id IS NULL AND is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) <= #{cutoffDate}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalWorkouts, COALESCE(SUM(total_sets), 0) AS totalSets, COALESCE(SUM(total_reps), 0) AS totalReps, COALESCE(AVG(duration), 0) AS avgDuration FROM training_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(train_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS workouts, COALESCE(SUM(total_sets), 0) AS sets, COALESCE(SUM(total_reps), 0) AS reps FROM training_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} AND train_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(train_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
